name: Multiple injuries from one work accident in Riverton, how to claim all?

mainEntity.name: Multiple injuries from one work accident in Riverton, how to claim all?

acceptedAnswer.text: Detail all on initial form, full medical eval.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: List all body parts/injuries on FROI form, get comprehensive eval; Utah comp covers cumulative effects if work-related. No limit on claims.[1] Key factors: detailed IME, related symptoms proof. Treat fully, rate each impairment; maximize PPD. Thorough filing prevents denials.

description: Detail all on initial form, full medical eval.[1]
